field.label: Transaction Environment
field.comment: Choose Live to perform real transaction

field.label: NICEPay API Version
field.comment: Choose Nicepay APi Version registered for your iMid

field.label: Use Min Amount Rule
field.comment: Payment method only available when the minimum amount reach

field.label: Use Max Amount Rule
field.comment: Payment method only available when amount not pass the maximum amount rule
